description:
Adds an automated action on survey.user_input that fires the moment ANY
scoring survey is submitted with score ≥ 90%. Looks up the matching
applicant by email_from, bumps their priority to ★★★ (priority='3'),
and posts a chatter alert tagging the assigned recruiter so they get
inbox-notified instantly.

Pure routing — no fields, no templates, no schedule. Fires alongside
any other survey-done automations (e.g. info survey adjudication);
multiple base.automation rows on the same model + trigger run
independently.
